sections.headline: Cold chain is not what we do. It's what we are.
sections.subheadline:
Crystal was founded in 1962. We entered cold chain in 2000.
In the years since, we've built, operated, and refined every part of the cold chain: warehousing, transport, containers, processing, and infrastructure.
We know what works, what breaks, and what it takes to do this at scale.

body: Crystal's cold chain journey began with a single conviction: that India's perishable supply chain deserved better infrastructure, better operations, and a partner that understood the stakes. Over 25 years, that conviction has been tested across every kind of cold chain challenge: demanding pharma clients, fast-scaling food brands, complex export requirements, and the relentless pace of quick commerce.

Today, Crystal operates facilities across India, serves over 300 active clients, and manages cold chain for some of the country's most recognised brands. We're backed by institutional investors who share our belief that India's cold chain infrastructure needs to be rebuilt: at scale, to global standards, with operational discipline.

We are not a warehouse company that added trucks. We are not a transport company that built a cold room.
Crystal is an end-to-end cold chain platform: built from the ground up, one problem at a time.

sections.vision: To be the most reliable, innovative, and trusted cold chain partner for temperature-sensitive products, across India and beyond.
sections.mission: To deliver efficient, engineered, end-to-end cold chain solutions tailored to evolving customer needs, while building India's most capable cold chain platform.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: We say what we'll do and do what we say. In cold chain, there is no room for ambiguity.

items.title: Ownership
items.description: We take responsibility for outcomes, not just outputs. If it's under our watch, it's our problem to solve.

items.title: Agility
items.description: Cold chain doesn't wait. We move fast, adapt quickly, and solve problems before they become crises.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: World-class cold chain infrastructure, operated with precision. Every time.

founder.name: Murari Lal Agarwal
founder.title: Founder
founder.bio: In 1962, Shri Murari Lal Agarwal founded Crystal with a conviction that has never wavered: that India's perishable supply chain deserved infrastructure built to last, and people willing to stand behind every degree. What began with a single cold storage facility grew, over decades of relentless work, into one of India's most trusted cold chain platforms. His belief — that operational excellence is the highest form of respect for the products in your care — is the foundation on which Crystal still operates today.

awards: India's best cold chain logistics service provider, Global Cold Chain Alliance
